info.name: Amazon Security Lake API
info.description:
Amazon Security Lake is a service that automatically centralizes an organization's security data from cloud, on-premises, and custom sources into a purpose-built data lake stored in your own Amazon S3. It manages the data lifecycle and supports OCSF (Open Cybersecurity Schema Framework) for normalized security data analysis.

Contact Support:
 Name: Amazon Web Services

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Update Data Lake

variable.description: (Required) The ARN of the data lake to update.

request.description: Updates the configuration of a data lake.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Delete Data Lake

variable.description: (Required) The ARN of the data lake to delete.

request.description: Deletes the Amazon Security Lake data lake configuration object for the specified account and Region.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Get Data Lake Sources

request.description: Retrieves a snapshot of the current Region, including whether Amazon Security Lake is enabled for those accounts and which sources Security Lake is collecting data from.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Create Data Lake

request.description: Creates a Security Lake data lake in the specified regions. Security Lake begins ingesting security data after you create the data lake.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Security Lake List Data Lakes

query.description: List of regions to include in the response.
List of regions to include in the response.

request.description: Lists information about the data lakes in the current AWS account and Region.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

query.description: List of regions to include in the response.

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Create AWS Log Source

request.description: Adds a natively supported Amazon Web Service as an Amazon Security Lake source.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey

item.name: Amazon Security Lake Create Custom Log Source

request.description: Adds a third-party custom source in Amazon Security Lake to store log data.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: apikey
